company.name: Obsidian Capital
company.about: Obsidian Capital is a quantitative trading firm, leveraging algorithms and low-latency technologies to provide liquidity in financial markets. Our team develops and implements advanced trading strategies that quickly respond to market dynamics. We strategically deploy proprietary capital for active trading, utilizing quantitative models to generate consistent returns.

jobs.title: Quantitative Trader
jobs.overview: We are looking for a Quantitative Trader to design, implement, and improve algorithmic trading strategies. You will work across the full strategy lifecycle from signal research and backtesting to live deployment and performance monitoring with direct impact on the firm's profitability.
responsibilities: Design, implement, and maintain data-driven trading strategies
Analyze high-frequency market data to identify patterns and inefficiencies
Monitor strategies in production and adjust parameters based on live feedback
Perform post-trade analysis and risk reviews to optimize performance and stability
Collaborate with quantitative researchers and software developers to improve execution logic and system performance
requiredQualifications: Strong background in mathematics, statistics, physics, or data science, with emphasis on strong probabilistic thinking
Analytical mindset with the ability to interpret market data and performance metrics
Passion for financial markets and strong trading intuition, with the ability to identify patterns and assess risk in dynamic market environments
A proactive mindset with a willingness to take ownership
preferredQualifications: Previous experience as a quant trader is a strong advantage
Knowledge of market microstructure and liquidity fragmentation
Exposure to high-frequency or intraday strategies
offer: Opportunities for professional growth and learning

jobs.title: Quantitative Research Engineer
overview: This is a hybrid role that combines quantitative research, data science, and software engineering. You will be responsible for researching high-frequency datasets, discovering predictive signals, designing backtests, and deploying models to production.
This role is ideal for someone who enjoys solving real-world problems using a scientific approach, thrives in fast-paced environments, and wants their work to have a direct trading impact.
responsibilities: Analyze market and order book data to identify alpha-generating signals
Prototype and evaluate predictive models using statistical techniques
Design and run controlled backtests to assess strategy performance and robustness
Collaborate with traders and engineers to ensure efficient execution and system integration
requiredQualifications: 4+ years of experience in quantitative research, data science, or software development
Strong background in mathematics, statistics and probability
Analytical mindset with the ability to interpret market data and performance metrics
A proactive mindset with a willingness to take ownership
preferredQualifications: PhD in statistics or mathematics is a strong advantage
Experience building data models or backtesting infrastructure
Knowledge of financial markets and trading concepts
offer: Opportunities for professional growth and learning

jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer
jobs.overview: Obsidian Capital is seeking a highly skilled Senior Software Engineer responsible for developing tools and infrastructure used by Traders and Quantitative Researchers. In this role, you will be working with others to provide cutting-edge technology solutions that improve our existing trading system. You will have an opportunity to work on high-impact projects that influence the entire organization.
responsibilities: Design, develop, and maintain sophisticated trading algorithms
Optimize code for low-latency performance in a fast-paced trading environment
Enhance trading and research processes by leveraging and improving our proprietary infrastructure
Evaluate new technologies and suggest fundamental improvements to our technology stack
Collaborate with other developers, traders, and quantitative researchers to implement and refine trading strategies
Identify, troubleshoot, and resolve issues in real-time trading environments
requiredQualifications: 5+ years of professional experience in building software systems
Solid understanding of data structures, algorithms, and design patterns
Interest in financial markets and algorithmic trading
High capacity to learn and implement new technologies
preferredQualifications: Experience in quantitative finance or algorithmic trading
Knowledge of financial markets and trading concepts
offer: Opportunities for professional growth and learning
